sizing_rule.note: Position Size = Worst Possible Loss / (-optimal_f). Optimal f is found by iterating f values (starting at 0.02) across all N outcome scenarios to maximize geometric mean. Calculate position quantity by dividing the most negative scenario outcome by the negative optimal f value.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by finding the optimal f value that maximizes geometric mean across all possible outcome scenarios, then dividing the worst possible loss by the negative optimal f to determine position quantity.
